MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: N. Wong; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood is present. Represented by Abdolloh Dos.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Dayman Chatman is present.
Attorney Dayman Chatman representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Steven Derby, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of April 20, 2015 is vacated.
